title: umbilicus thyrsiflorus
intro: Umbilicus thyrsiflorus, also known as the sticky catchfly or sticky germander, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Umbilicus thyrsiflorus include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a salve or ointment to be applied topically, and it can also be consumed as a tea or infusion to reap its medicinal benefits.
